operator_acceptance_rationale: Accepted despite 84079 < 86000 because full 24h wall-clock, zero parse errors, complete minute coverage, completed-window changes, and floor-hit delta 0 provide stronger evidence quality checks, matching CALIB-01 precedent.

secondary_gate_completed_window.computation: p99 of per-completed-window suppression counts over the soak window (gate_column=by_cause.dwell_hold). Replaces secondary_gate_legacy at v1.44.
secondary_gate_completed_window.name: ul_suppressions_completed_window_count_p99

secondary_gate_legacy.computation: Mean of live-counter snapshots within each 60s window, then mean across windows. Verbatim port of v1.42 Plan 201-16 jq pipeline. PRESERVED FOR ONE TRANSITION CYCLE - drops in v1.44.
secondary_gate_legacy.name: ul_hysteresis_suppression_rate_per_60s_mean (legacy live-counter-snapshot mean)
secondary_gate_legacy.note: This metric is metric-semantically broken; see Phase 201 RETRO Lesson #1. Use secondary_gate_completed_window for actual gating.
